src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization best practices.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, modern Java tooling (and strict compilers) warn or error about missing @Serial on serialVersionUID; this is part of the Java 21 modernization standard.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation syntax introduced in Java 15.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to adopt Spring Boot 3.x preferred constructor injection style.
